name: Custom Chinese-language psychology / behavioral science queries (15 queries)
purpose: Self-built benchmark for paper-search-pro Chinese-language coverage testing. Author user is a Chinese-language psychology graduate student; these queries reflect realistic research topics in psychology, cognitive science, education, public health, and behavioral economics where bilingual literature (Chinese + English) is relevant. Use to assess (a) whether the Skill's English-trained classifier handles Chinese topic queries correctly via translation, (b) whether OpenAlex / Semantic Scholar recall is acceptable on these topics, (c) where CNKI / Wanfang supplementation would be needed (per known_limitations.md).
expected_difficulty_meaning: easy = 30+ highly relevant English-language papers in OpenAlex; medium = 10-30 English papers exist but Chinese-language papers also important; hard = topic primarily Chinese-language or interdisciplinary, English-only search likely misses > 50% of literature
language_note: Queries are in Chinese (Simplified). plan_search must translate or generate parallel English queries; report can be bilingual (config.language = 'zh' or 'en').

queries.query: 工作记忆训练对老年人认知功能的影响
queries.english_parallel: Effects of working memory training on cognitive function in older adults

queries.query: 自我决定理论在教育情境中的应用
queries.english_parallel: Self-determination theory applied to educational contexts

queries.query: 正念冥想干预对大学生焦虑抑郁的元分析
queries.english_parallel: Meta-analysis of mindfulness meditation interventions on anxiety and depression in university students

queries.query: 中国留守儿童心理健康影响因素的纵向研究
queries.english_parallel: Longitudinal studies of psychological well-being factors among left-behind children in China
queries.note: Substantial Chinese-language literature on this topic; CNKI supplementation strongly recommended

queries.query: 社交媒体使用与青少年自尊的关系
queries.english_parallel: Social media use and adolescent self-esteem

queries.query: 前景理论在金融决策中的神经经济学证据
queries.english_parallel: Neuroeconomic evidence for prospect theory in financial decision-making

queries.query: 依恋类型对成年期亲密关系满意度的影响
queries.english_parallel: Influence of attachment styles on intimate relationship satisfaction in adulthood

queries.query: 执行功能与儿童学业成就的发展关联
queries.english_parallel: Developmental relationships between executive function and academic achievement in children

queries.query: 孤独感对老年人心血管健康的影响机制
queries.english_parallel: Mechanisms linking loneliness to cardiovascular health in older adults

queries.query: 新冠疫情对中国大学生心理弹性的影响研究
queries.english_parallel: Effects of the COVID-19 pandemic on psychological resilience in Chinese university students
queries.note: Topic dual-language; English-only search recovers most but Chinese-language supplementation valuable

queries.query: 积极心理学干预对职场倦怠的有效性
queries.english_parallel: Effectiveness of positive psychology interventions on workplace burnout

queries.query: 视频游戏对青少年注意力和反应时的双重影响
queries.english_parallel: Dual effects of video games on adolescent attention and reaction time

queries.query: 中医情志理论与现代情绪调节的整合研究
queries.english_parallel: Integration of Traditional Chinese Medicine emotion theory with modern emotion regulation research
queries.note: Topic primarily Chinese-language; CNKI essential, OpenAlex/SS coverage poor

queries.query: 教师反馈方式对学生学习动机的影响
queries.english_parallel: Effects of teacher feedback styles on student learning motivation

queries.query: 睡眠剥夺对大学生情绪认知双重任务表现的影响
queries.english_parallel: Effects of sleep deprivation on dual-task performance combining emotion and cognition in university students
